sections.description: A unified, modular workspace platform for any business industry. Supports Real Estate agencies, Photography Studios, and more — all in one plugin with dynamic module switching, industry onboarding, and one-click auto-updates.
sections.changelog:
2.2.1 — Industry Mode Switcher & Workspace Scoping

  • Industry Mode Switcher: Dedicated Shruti Admin toggle in sidebar header to switch between Real Estate and Studio modes in 1 click.
  • Independent Workspace Scoping: Multi-user workspace data isolation per domain slug (app.heycora.in/{{slug}}).
  • Role Permission Seeding: Updated default capability matrices for all Real Estate and Studio roles.
